channel.title: Spreadsheet on Banghao's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Spreadsheet on Banghao's Blog

item.title: Spreadsheet-RL: Training Spreadsheet Agents with Real Excel and Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Paper / Project page / Code / Dataset / Model Spreadsheet software is one of the most ordinary, durable, and quietly difficult interfaces in computing. A spreadsheet can be a small personal budget, a messy monthly close workbook, an investment-banking model, a sales report, a supply-chain planning sheet, or a hand-built database that has survived for years because it works just well enough. That makes spreadsheets a natural target for AI agents: many people would like to say what they want, let the system edit the workbook, and receive a correct final file.
